batches.title: Arthur Merlin LuBu Mike
batches.prompt: Generate exactly one square 2x2 character sheet for a top-down action roguelike. Output exactly one image only. Put four separate full-body gameplay sprites on a transparent background. If transparency is impossible, use a perfectly flat pure white background with no texture or gradient. Leave generous spacing between characters so each one can be cropped out cleanly. No scene, no floor, no props, no text, no UI frame, no overlapping limbs between characters, no extra heads, no duplicate characters. Style target: premium 2D action roguelike character art with the readability and charm of Brotato, but not potato bodies. Each character is a mini chad: very large head, small compact body, strong chiseled jaw, expressive face, crisp thick outline, simple high-contrast shading, clean silhouette, game-ready full-body sprite, front-facing or slight three-quarter game pose suitable for a top-down survivor game. Use the attached portrait references only to preserve identity, costume, hair, facial hair, and color palette. Redraw them in this mini-chad sprite style. Layout: top-left Arthur, battle-worn knight mini chad. Top-right Merlin, old sorcerer mini chad. Bottom-left Lu Bu, warlord mini chad. Bottom-right Mike, streetwise bruiser mini chad. All four characters should be isolated, consistent scale, fully visible, and ready to be cropped individually into game sprites.

batches.title: Bounce Idol Effects
batches.prompt: Generate exactly one square 2x2 sprite sheet for top-down survivor idol follow-up effects. Output exactly one image only. Put four separate isolated effect sprites on a transparent background. If transparency is impossible, use a perfectly flat pure white background with no texture or gradient. Leave generous spacing between subjects. No scene, no floor, no text, no UI. These are gameplay effect sprites, not UI icons. Keep them compact, readable, and punchy with thick silhouettes and strong color identity. Layout: top-left Idol_Electric, a sharp lightning strike burst suitable for a stun and chain hit. Top-right Idol_Ice, a cold crystalline burst suitable for a freeze or chill proc. Bottom-left Idol_Shadow, a dark slash or void burst suitable for a shadow chain hit. Bottom-right Idol_Star, a radiant star spark burst suitable for a ricochet impact. Each subject should be centered, isolated, and ready to crop into a single effect sprite.
